creator: g.lister@nodeunit.ch
text:
(In reply to Xin LI from comment #1)

Yes I can access the site update5.freebsd.org. I forgot to mention that I am behind a proxy. I tried once looking at the proxy access log and all seems fine until a certain point at which freebsd-update report that the download has failed. I am not sure if it is some kind of a timeout.

I have removed the proxy and I am trying again right now.
Thanks.
George
